sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check what changed after DOWN
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for i, an in enumerate(after):
    bn = before[i] if i < len(before) else None
    if bn:
        br = [p[0] for p in bn['boundary']]
        ar = [p[1] for p in bn['boundary']]
        ar2 = [p[0] for p in an['boundary']]
        ar3 = [p[1] for p in an['boundary']]
        if br != ar2 or ar != ar3:
            print(f'Node {i} ({an["color"]}): before r={min(br)} c={min(ar)}-{max(ar3)}-{max(ar3)}')
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
